results.title: Astros RHP Hunter Brown (shoulder) slated to return Tuesday
results.description: Jun 7, 2026; Houston, Texas, USA; Houston Astros pitcher Hunter Brown throws on the field before the game against the Athletics at Daikin Park. Mandatory Credit: Troy Taormina-Imagn Images Houston Astros ace right-hander Hunter Brown is slated to return to the starting rotation Tuesday against the Detroit Tigers after missing 2 1/2 months with a [...] The post Astros RHP Hunter Brown (shoulder) slated to return Tuesday appeared first on CBNC .

results.title: Starmer says Strait of Hormuz must stay open after Iran-US peace deal announced
results.description: Shehbaz Sharif, the prime minister of Pakistan, which has been mediating in the conflict, said the accord covered Lebanon.

results.title: Scottish 'Tartan Army' Takes Over Fenway, Blasts Bagpipes Before Red Sox Game
Morocco expose Brazil flaws but settle for draw in heavyweight clash
results.description: Brazil and Morocco played out a 1-1 draw in the first heavyweight clash of the World Cup on Saturday, with the African side confirming their potential while exposing familiar weaknesses in their opponents at a sold out New York/New Jersey stadium. Ismael Saibari gave Morocco a deserved first-half lead before Vinicius Jr produced a moment [...]

results.title: Masood’s Test captaincy to be decided by ‘cricket minds’, says Naqvi
results.description: Pakistan Cricket Board (PCB) Chairman Mohsin Naqvi stated that the decision regarding Shan Masood’s continuation as captain of Pakistan’s men’s Test side would be made by “cricket minds”. Naqvi, while speaking informally to the media after meeting the national players and support staff on the sidelines of Pakistan’s pre-season red-ball camp at the National Cricket [...]
results.source: Daily Times - Latest Pakistan News, World, Busines
